_README: Lighting config for ShowRunner — read at launch by the (separate) Lighting module. Editing this file NEVER affects the audio show. Keys starting with _ are notes and are ignored by the app. Set 'enabled' to false to turn lighting off entirely.
_VENUE: CC De Factorij (Theaterzaal Maupertuis), Zaventem. This patch is the FINAL venue lighting plot: Lighting_Plot/Lions patchv01.pdf + Lions v01.pdf (drawing 'Lions v01', Bruno Peysmans, 11/6/2026). Universe 1 = front catwalk 2KW dimmers (addr 2–24) + house lights 501–506 + MDG ATMe hazer 509–512 (house/hazer NOT patched here — venue-run). Universe 2 = 8× Robe Spiider Mode 3 33ch + 2× Robe T1 Profile Mode 3 53ch. Universe 3 = 7× Robert Juliat Dalis 860 MKII Mode 2 22ch (plot labels Dalis 4–10, the upstage cyc row). Light network: 192.168.202.0/24, DHCP, protocol sACN.
_POSITIONS: From the plot (top view): Spiider1/2 downstage pair at ±2 m; Spiider3/4 wide pair at ±7 m; Spiider5/6 wide pair at ±7 m one batten upstage; Spiider7/8 upstage inner pair at ±3 m; T1L/T1R upstage-centre back-key specials over the piano; Dalis 4–10 one even row washing the cyc. Mirrored pairs: 1↔2, 3↔4, 5↔6, 7↔8 (right pan = 1 − left pan).

_CONFIRM.modes: Modes come from the venue's own patch sheet and the profiles are built from the OFFICIAL charts (Robe Spiider chart v2.3 Mode 3; Robe T1 Profile chart v2.1 Mode 3; RJ Dalis 860 manual DN41077600-B Mode 2). Remaining risk is paper vs reality: on the day confirm each fixture's PATCHED mode matches the plot, then tap ARM MOVERS (Spiiders + T1s stay dark until armed). The Dalis profile is live (no arming) — sanity-check its colours at soundcheck.
_CONFIRM.network: 'mode' = 'multicast' (onto the venue sACN lighting LAN, 239.255.x.x) or 'unicast' (to a node IP via 'unicastHost'). Venue: light network 192.168.202.0/24 with DHCP, default protocol sACN — multicast should work as-is; coordinate with the venue tech.
_CONFIRM.front_catwalk: Universe 1 addr 2–24 are the venue's 2KW Profile/PC front-catwalk dimmers, driven as ONE level ('FrontWash'). Their focus is the venue's — ask for an even piano-centred front wash.
_CONFIRM.hazer: MDG ATMe on universe 1: 509 heater (always on), 510 pressure, 511 fog on/off, 512 fan. Deliberately NOT patched — agree haze level with the venue tech (the EDM beam looks want haze).

_PIECES_NOTE: Keys MUST match the 'order' strings in showrunner.json (the 20-cue running order: 1-3, S1, 4-6, S2, 7-9, S3, 10-12, S4, 13, E1-E3). S1-S4 are Lionel's speaking cues — a warm, calm look so he reads while talking.
